'''fatholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qoph|qoph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qoph|qoph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fatholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætheleth|fætheleth]] || [[word:fæthelej|fæthelej]] || [[word:fæthelesh|fæthelesh]] || [[word:fæthele|fæthele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathotholoth|fathotholoth]] || [[word:fathotholoj|fathotholoj]] || [[word:fathotholosh|fathotholosh]] || [[word:fathotholo|fathotholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatholoth|fatholoth]] || [[word:fatholoj|fatholoj]] || [[word:fatholosh|fatholosh]] || [[word:fatholo|fatholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofloth|fathofloth]] || [[word:fathofloj|fathofloj]] || [[word:fathoflosh|fathoflosh]] || [[word:fathoflof|fathoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatholotho|fatholotho]] || [[word:fatholojo|fatholojo]] || [[word:fatholosho|fatholosho]] || [[word:fatholoko|fatholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatholoth|fatholoth]] || [[word:fatholoj|fatholoj]] || [[word:fatholosh|fatholosh]] || [[word:fatholo|fatholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatholothol|fatholothol]] || [[word:fatholojol|fatholojol]] || [[word:fatholoshol|fatholoshol]] || [[word:fatholokol|fatholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatholothotho|fatholothotho]] || [[word:fatholojojo|fatholojojo]] || [[word:fatholoshosho|fatholoshosho]] || [[word:fatholoko|fatholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatholothon|fatholothon]] || [[word:fatholojon|fatholojon]] || [[word:fatholoshon|fatholoshon]] || [[word:fatholokon|fatholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatholothoro|fatholothoro]] || [[word:fatholojoro|fatholojoro]] || [[word:fatholoshoro|fatholoshoro]] || [[word:fatholokoro|fatholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
